shared_attributes.scrolling: parallax or synchronized with game speed

context.role: Defines ground level, provides landing reference for player, creates movement sensation through scrolling
context.screen_position: y=0px (ground level), spans entire screen width with tiling
context.usage_scenario: Continuously visible, scrolls right-to-left at Current_Speed to create running sensation

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal line with optional small rocks/grass texture elements
visual_specification.texture: minimal pixel art, optional small dots or grass sprites spaced 50-100px apart

animation.description: Tile scrolls right-to-left at Current_Speed, seamless loop when x < -1200px then x += 1200px

visual_specification.details: 2px thick horizontal line at y=0px, optional texture layer (1200x10px) with sparse small rocks or grass elements for visual interest

relationships.shared_with: Provides Y=0 reference for all ground-based objects
relationships.differences_from: background scrolls at 0.5x speed (parallax), ground scrolls at 1.0x speed (synchronized with obstacles)
